name: Creamy Pepper Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Liquid From Hot Pepper Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir in cream cheese until smooth.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
4. Garnish with pepper rings.
5. Serve with fresh vegetables or crackers for dipping.
